features.name: $bits applied to indexed packed struct member
features.description: Code should include a $bits function call applied to an indexed element of a member within a packed struct typedef
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [1:0][15:0] v_2x16; logic [1:0] v_2bit; } struct_2el; struct_2el array; assign o = $bits(array.v_2x16[0]);
